DESCRIPTION:
As an Accounts Receivable user
  I want to close a dispute case in SAP
  So that the case status is updated and reflected in the Closed section
NAME: Close an existing dispute case

DESCRIPTION:
As an Accounts Receivable user

  I want to edit customer line items in SAP

  So that the changes are saved and reflected in the system
NAME: Edit an existing customer line item

DESCRIPTION:
As an Accounts Payable user
  I want to unblock a supplier in SAP
  So that the supplier can receive payments again
NAME: Unblock a supplier currently blocked for payment

DESCRIPTION:
As an Accounts Receivable user
  I want to create a new dispute case in SAP
  So that disputes are logged with the correct details for resolution
NAME: Create a new dispute case
